info.name: Losant Edge and Embedded Compute API
Retrieves Information on an Edge Deployment

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: edgeDeploymentId
params.description: ID associated with the edge deployment

items.docs: Retrieves Information on an Edge Deployment

info.name: Returns the Edge Deployments for an Application

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort the results by

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: page
params.description: Which page of results to return

params.name: perPage
params.description: How many items to return per page

params.name: deviceId
params.description: Filter deployments to the given Device ID

params.name: version
params.description: Filter deployments to the given Workflow Version (matches against both current and desired)

params.name: filterEmpty
params.description: Filter out deployments where both the current and desired version are null.

params.name: flowId
params.description: Filter deployments to the given Workflow ID

items.docs: Returns the Edge Deployments for an Application

info.name: Replace Deployments of an Edge Workflow Version with a New Version. New Version Can Be Blank, if Removal Is Desired.

params.description: ID associated with the application
